chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.241 of 2024 Pakistan Civil Aviation Authority Versus M/s Vorson (Pvt.) Limited and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing Case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing on CMA No.1412/2024 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 07.08.2024 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This appeal is arising out of the orders passed in Suit No.386/2024. The orders were passed on 19.04.2024 and 23.04.2024. After arguing the matter at some length and also after considering the fact that Mr. Kaleem Khan, advocate has marked his appearance on 01.07.2024 to appear in this matter on behalf of respondent No.1, counsel submits that he would be satisfied if the learned single Judge is directed to decide the pending applications in all three suits, that is Suit Nos.2024/2023, 333/2024 and 386/2024, expeditiously, preferably in eight weeks. Order accordingly. With this understanding, the appeal has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
